name: Fallen One (spear)
description: A scrawny demon imp wielding a rusted spear. Weak and cowardly but dangerous in numbers.

name: Zombie
description: A shambling undead corpse, slow but relentless. Rotting flesh and hollow eyes.

name: Skeleton
description: An animated skeleton warrior. Low on life but strikes with alarming precision.

name: Fallen One (sword)
description: A small demon clutching a chipped sword, shrieking battle cries in an unknown tongue.

name: The Butcher
description: AHHH... fresh meat! The Butcher's massive frame fills the doorway. The walls are painted red. His cleaver drips. There is no negotiating with this.

name: Carver
description: A bolder, stockier fallen demon that charges with surprising ferocity. Quick to rally its lesser kin.

name: Scavenger
description: A four-legged carrion beast drawn by the smell of death. Fast and vicious when cornered.

name: Ghoul
description: A hunched ghoul with jagged claws. Stronger than a zombie and harder to put down.

name: Devil Kin
description: A seasoned fallen warrior smarter and harder to kill than its lesser kin. It commands from the back of the pack.

name: Rotting Carcass
description: A bloated, decomposing horror barely holding itself together. Each step leaves a trail of rot.

name: Corpse Axe
description: A skeletal warrior armed with a rusted axe. Fast, precise, and nearly impossible to ignore.

name: Vile Hunter
description: A lithe demon that weaves between shadows. Its erratic movements make it maddening to fight.

name: Dark One
description: The apex of the fallen demon lineage. Its dark eyes burn with genuine malice and cunning.

name: Black Death
description: A massive undead brute reeking of plague. Its very touch drains the life from a man.

name: Burning Dead
description: A skeleton wreathed in hellfire. It moves with terrifying speed, its bones glowing molten orange.

name: Wraith
description: A translucent spectre that phases through walls. Its arcane strikes bypass armour entirely.

name: Goat Man
description: A horned demonic warrior built like a battering ram. Its charge can send a man flying across the cavern.

name: Stone Golem
description: A massive animated statue of ancient stone. Nearly impervious to damage — patience and raw strength are the only answer.

name: Doom Guard
description: An armoured demon guardian wielding twin blades. Its relentless assault leaves no moment to breathe.

name: Horror
description: A charred skeletal abomination that screeches as it charges. Faster and deadlier than any Burning Dead.

name: Shade
description: A shadow given terrible purpose. It strikes from angles that shouldn't exist, draining warmth as it passes.

name: Overlord
description: A mountain of demonic muscle and fury. Its blows shake the cavern floor and crack the stone walls.

name: Lich
description: An ancient sorcerer-king risen from death. Its dark magic tears at mind and body alike.

name: Succubus
description: A seductive demon of terrible power. Its ranged attacks strike before you even see it move.

name: Iron Golem
description: A towering automaton of forged hellish iron. Each blow hammers like a siege weapon.

name: Balrog
description: A demon of shadow and flame. The floor cracks beneath its hooves. The air itself ignites in its wake.

name: Advocate
description: A supremely powerful demon sorcerer and judge of souls. Ancient beyond reckoning, deadly beyond measure.

name: Blood Knight
description: Hell's elite warrior, clad in armour forged from the bones of fallen heroes. The pinnacle of demonic martial power.
